hero.name: Simon Bacon
hero.subtitle: 35+ years dedicated to child support
hero.description: One of Australia's most experienced child support practitioners. Published author, former Legal Aid Queensland principal child support lawyer and recognised authority in child support practice.

paragraphs: Simon Bacon has spent his entire career in child support — a field he entered after graduating from the University of Melbourne Law School, being admitted as a barrister and solicitor and then discovering that few other lawyers understood its complexities.

That early insight shaped a career spanning more than three decades. As Principal Lawyer at Legal Aid Queensland's child support division, Simon built deep expertise in the legislative framework, administrative processes, and practical realities that govern how child support operates in Australia.

Simon established his Melbourne-based law practice at Normanby Chambers (Manby and Scott Child Support Lawyers) in 2004. Thereafter, Simon became known as one of the country's leading authorities in child support law. His client base extended across every Australian state and territory, with parents, accountants, and other professionals seeking his guidance on complex assessment, agreement, and enforcement issues.

In 2025, Simon shut down Manby and Scott Child Support Lawyers and transitioned to an advisory model. His aim was to provide the same depth of specialist guidance through administrative channels at a fraction of costs traditionally charged by law firms. This reflects a practical reality: most child support matters are resolved through reviews, litigation in the ART, child support agreements, and agency processes, not courtrooms.

contact.consultations: Phone and video consultations available for clients throughout Australia. Your initial consultation is free and without obligation.

footer.disclaimer: Information on this website is general in nature and does not constitute legal advice.

seo.title: Simon Bacon | Child Support Consultant & Advisory Expert | Melbourne
seo.description: Simon Bacon — over 35 years specialising in child support advisory services in Australia. Published author, former Legal Aid principal, and recognised expert in child support law.
